findings: Moderate shortcut-like predictive signals were observed for tested features Average Packet Size, Packet Length Mean, and Avg Bwd Segment Size within a cluster of strongly correlated features.
Strong linear dependencies (correlation >=0.9993) among many features indicate potential redundancy and shortcut risk in this feature cluster.
Evidence is limited to tested features; other correlated features remain untested for shortcut signals.
limitations: Shortcut-like predictive power was tested only on a subset of correlated features due to step budget constraints.
Findings are local to the tested features and do not generalize to all correlated features in the cluster.
